mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP growth expands corporate earnings expectations, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window despite positive GDPC1 growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid federal funds rate hikes increase discount rates and signal aggressive tightening, compressing equity multiples within a week.
failure_condition: SPX forward 5d returns are not significantly negative when FEDFUNDS jumps >0.25pp monthly (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strong payroll growth and stable unemployment indicate a healthy labor market that supports consumer spending and corporate profits, driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint PAYEMS/UNRATE signal produces negative or zero predictive power for 60d returns in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects robust manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which historically precedes positive S&P 500 returns when inflation is contained.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases coincide with negative SPX 20d returns in >60% of observations during disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening consumer demand and credit conditions, leading to negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns remain positive or neutral when HOUST drops below 1100 units.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently high consumer price inflation erodes real purchasing power and forces prolonged monetary tightening, which suppresses equity valuations over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL levels show no negative correlation with 60d SPX returns over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business confidence, driving positive S&P 500 returns as earnings revisions turn upward.
failure_condition: The joint RSAFS/HOUST composite signal fails to predict positive 20d SPX returns in walk-forward validation (IC < 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in labor market conditions during a late-cycle phase triggers recession fears, causing equity multiples to contract sharply over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are not significantly negative when UNRATE accelerates >0.5pp alongside falling PAYEMS during late-cycle phases.
